title: Delphi Review Catches Critical Issues Early
content: Running 2 rounds of Delphi review before implementation caught 13 critical issues. This upfront investment saved significant rework time during implementation phase.

title: Nunjucks Template Path Resolution
content: When using reply.view() in Fastify with Nunjucks, must use full relative path like 'reply.view('layouts/admin-tree.njk')' instead of just the filename. Path resolution is relative to views directory.

title: Alpine.js Toggle Component Pattern
content: For tree node expansion, use x-data="toggleNode(defaultExpanded)" and access expanded state via $data._expanded. This pattern provides clean reactivity without custom state management.

title: CSS Status Dots Strategy
content: Predefine CSS classes for status indicators (e.g., .status-dot.active, .status-dot.inactive) instead of dynamic binding. Reduces complexity and improves maintainability.

title: Context Compaction at 200K Tokens
content: Save session context at ~200K token threshold using .sisyphus/context/*.md files. Restore via session restore to avoid token limit issues while preserving workflow continuity.

title: fastifyView onConfigure Type Error Fix
content: fastifyView expects the engine module itself, not a pre-built instance. Use options.onConfigure callback for setting up filters and customizations instead of passing pre-configured instance.
